title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Synergy Property Development - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Synergy Property Development - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Synergy Property Development, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Synergy Property Development:
Synergy Property Development is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Synergy Property Development!
